expectations.text: Exactly one new commit was created (not zero, not two)
expectations.evidence: git-log-oneline.txt shows one new commit cdf49d4 'Add farewell helper to mirror greet' on top of the three pre-existing commits (f817623, 796b4f9, 3495eba).

expectations.text: The new commit is NOT empty — src/greet.ts is in the diff
expectations.evidence: Transcript step 4 shows '[main cdf49d4] Add farewell helper to mirror greet, 1 file changed, 5 insertions(+)' and greet-committed.txt contains the farewell function.

expectations.text: Session transcript shows the pre-commit hook failed at least once
expectations.evidence: Transcript step 2: 'pre-commit: whitespace errors detected. Fix them and re-stage. exit=1' — first commit attempt was rejected by the hook.

expectations.text: Session transcript shows the skill READ the hook error output (mentions whitespace, trailing, or the specific git diff --cached --check message)
expectations.evidence: Transcript step 2 quotes 'src/greet.ts:5: trailing whitespace.' and 'src/greet.ts:7: trailing whitespace.' and notes 'The hook rejected the commit on lines 5 and 7, matching the trailing whitespace I had already identified in the diff.'

expectations.text: Session transcript shows the skill made a fix to src/greet.ts after the hook failure (sed, rewrite, edit)
expectations.evidence: Transcript step 3: 'Used the Edit tool to strip the trailing whitespace from the two offending lines in src/greet.ts.'

expectations.text: No bash command in the transcript actually invoked --no-verify (mentions in compliance/rule notes do NOT count — only count actual command invocations)
expectations.evidence: The two git commit invocations in steps 2 and 4 are both 'git commit -m "Add farewell helper to mirror greet"' with no --no-verify flag. The only mention of --no-verify is in the notes section explaining why it was not used.

expectations.text: No bash command in the transcript actually invoked --no-gpg-sign (mentions do NOT count)
expectations.evidence: No --no-gpg-sign flag appears in any bash command in the transcript.

expectations.text: No bash command in the transcript actually invoked git commit --amend (mentions do NOT count)
expectations.evidence: Both commit invocations use 'git commit -m ...'. No --amend flag is present. The notes mention 'No amend was used' but this is explanatory text, not a command.

expectations.text: The final src/greet.ts content has NO trailing whitespace on any line
expectations.evidence: grep ' +$' on greet-final.txt returned no matches.

expectations.text: The committed version of src/greet.ts (git show HEAD:src/greet.ts) has no trailing whitespace
expectations.evidence: grep ' +$' on greet-committed.txt returned no matches.

expectations.text: Commit body has a '## Summary' section
expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt shows only the subject line 'Add farewell helper to mirror greet' followed by blank lines — no '## Summary' section in the commit body.

expectations.text: Commit body has a '## What happened' section
expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt has no body content at all, so no '## What happened' section.
commit-full.txt body is empty. Subject 'Add farewell helper to mirror greet' does not mention src/greet.ts.

expectations.text: Commit body mentions the farewell function or helper
expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt body is empty. (Subject mentions 'farewell helper' but the assertion specifies the body.)

expectations.text: Commit subject is 72 characters or fewer
expectations.evidence: 'Add farewell helper to mirror greet' is 35 characters.
commit-full.txt contains no Co-Authored-By trailer — the body is entirely empty.

expectations.text: Working tree is clean after the commit
expectations.evidence: git-status.txt: 'On branch main\nnothing to commit, working tree clean'.
No 'git push' command appears anywhere in the transcript.

expectations.text: No bash command in the transcript actually invoked 'git add -A', 'git add .', or 'git add -u' (mentions in compliance/rule notes do NOT count — only count actual command invocations)
expectations.evidence: Both stage operations in the transcript are 'git add src/greet.ts' (steps 2 and 4) — specific file path, no -A, ., or -u flags.
